flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at North Central Texas College rose 50% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.4k → $3.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at North Central Texas College fell 43% between 2006 and 2009 (9.8% → 5.5%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at North Central Texas College rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.1k → $11.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at North Central Texas College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.1k → $5.7k).
